name: Silent Oppenheimer
author: Feijoaoa

placementContext.reason: Silent Oppenheimer is a work of art inspired by Made in Abyss, featuring stunning visual storytelling and extreme mechanical timings that push 2.2 editor potential.

description: A highly conceptual and visually stunning solo project that has been over 178 hours in the making, featuring innovative mechanical gimmicks and ethereal atmospheric depth.
song: Dawn of the Deep Soul by various
